fields.title: [memory-api] Extract shared tracing initialization for all transports
[memory-api] Extract shared tracing initialization for all transports
[memory-api] Extract shared tracing initialization for all transports
[memory-api] Extract shared tracing initialization for all transports
fields.validation_summary: Extracted shared memory-api transport tracing initializer in memory-api::runtime::init_transport_tracing and wired representative binaries to it: ticket-cli (CLI), ticket-mcp (MCP), and ticket-http/spec-http/doc-http (HTTP). File logging support remains available for ticket-http via the shared helper. Validation passed via cargo check over memory-api, ticket-cli, ticket-http, spec-http, doc-http, and ticket-mcp.
